title: Fired BP chair disputes oil company’s claims of poor conduct
summary_full: Albert Manifold says he was removed without warning and ‘will not allow a false narrative to go unchallenged’Business live – latest updatesThe ousted chair of BP, Albert Manifold, has accused the oil company of firing him without warning and disputed reports about his conduct, amid the latest boardroom turmoil to rock the company.In an emailed statement, Manifold said he was “removed without warning and without explanation” by the FTSE 100 company. Continue reading...
